clusters.justification: This cluster reflects co-activation within limbic, insular, and autonomic pathways dedicated to the processing, physiological arousal, and regulation of emotional states and valence.
These terms map onto frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuits responsible for computing incentive weight, reinforcement learning, and cost-benefit analyses during goal-directed decision making.

This cluster aligns closely with the cortical midline and temporoparietal subsystems which map shared representations linking autobiographical self-projection, internal mentation, and the understanding of others.
